message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I already told you I can’t pay right now, and I’m not confirming anything else.
Understood. I’ve noted that you cannot pay right now and that you’re not confirming further details in this chat. I’m ending the assessment here.

Financial facts available from case state: available_now 0, expected_date 2026-04-20, next_allowed_actions OFFER_REDUCED_CLOSURE and OFFER_PAYMENT_PLAN. Case state also shows stop_contact_flag present. Already asked: one verification request for the last four digits of the account reference. Priority for Agent 2: do not repeat verification or capacity questions in this channel; address hardship/review first, respect the stop-contact/boundary signal, and only review policy-allowed next steps if outreach is permitted."}

Fine, note that I’m unemployed and I’m not promising any payment.

Understood. I’ve noted that you are unemployed and not making any payment commitment at this time. Your hardship status is recorded. Because you asked not to continue details in this channel, I will not pursue payment discussion here.
